title: ABC doesn't retime when _DFF_PP1_ cells are used, but does retime when _DFF_P_ cells are used

features.name: dff with set and reset pins for abc retiming
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop cell with separate set and reset pins (_DFF_PP1_) that triggers ABC retiming failure

features.name: techmap replacement of dff cell type
features.description: Code should include a techmap rule that replaces one DFF cell type with another DFF cell type during synthesis
